pi_items.source: Verified against env.json user_accounts which confirms 'Docker' user exists on Windows 11 environment; Documents folder is standard Windows user directory

Searched products.csv inventory: item NOT found. Web search found multiple BTS-200 models from Uniden ($29.25), Denver Electronics (price not displayed), AT&T ($unknown), and others, but none at specified price. Item is not in pre-loaded inventory per task.json description.
Task description states 'approximate prices' - no authoritative source found for BTS-200 at $45.99. Within plausible range for Bluetooth speakers but no exact match.

Searched products.csv inventory: item NOT found. Web search found Flexi Pro USB-C to USB-C 6ft cable at $24.99, various other USB-C cables at different price points. Item is not in pre-loaded inventory per task.json description.
Task description states 'approximate prices'. Web search found USB-C cables ranging widely ($12.99-$35.99+). $12.99 is within plausible range for a standard USB-C cable but no exact source found.

Searched products.csv inventory: item NOT found. Web search found universal clear phone cases available from Walmart ($3.88-$5.97), Best Buy, Amazon, Etsy, Target. Item is not in pre-loaded inventory per task.json description.

Task description states 'approximate prices'. Web search found Flexi Pro clear case at $24.99 (exact match), but not verified for 'Clear Phone Case Universal' brand. Prices range $3.88-$54.90 depending on retailer and material.
Verified as mathematically sound: $50.00 cash leaves $33.97 remaining balance to be paid via card on $83.97 total. Within normal retail payment ranges.

privileged_info_summary: The split payment sale task uses SYNTHETIC data. The three inventory items (Bluetooth Speaker BTS-200, USB-C Charging Cable 6ft, Clear Phone Case Universal) are not present in the pre-loaded products.csv inventory. The task explicitly allows agents to add these items with approximate prices if they are not found. Verified facts: (1) Expected total of $83.97 is mathematically correct (45.99 + 12.99 + 24.99). (2) Split cash amount of $50.00 is reasonable, leaving $33.97 balance for card payment. (3) Receipt path C:\Users\Docker\Documents\split_payment_receipt.png is valid for the Windows 11 Docker user environment. Individual item prices ($45.99, $12.99, $24.99) are stated as 'approximate' in task description; $24.99 for a universal phone case has some corroboration in market pricing (Flexi Pro case), but other prices lack exact sources.
